content.en:
"Triple to the peak of the Dao Realm, the next step is to impact the Quadruple Dao Realm, and prepare some more resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His bottleneck is different from the bottleneck of other Dao realms, he hits the fourfold Dao realm, which is equivalent to the other sixfold Dao realms impacting the sevenfold Dao realm.

Therefore, even if the seventh sequence of the Highest Dao Rule realm is very high, you still need to prepare some breakthrough resources before you can be sure of breaking through to the Fourfold Highest Dao realm.

Once he broke through to the Fourfold Highest Dao Realm, he was enough to match the top Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm.

......

The second odd place.

The Abyss of Skyscanner.

At this moment, there are many supreme realm realms stationed here, and there is no shortage of sixfold supreme realm realms.

Since Wuji Heavenly Palace and Taisu Palace and other forces have made peace, they are not afraid of Taisu Palace attacking here.

However, Ye Tian could directly enter the abyss of the Heavenly Search, just because this was also one of the conditions for peace talks.

Like several strange places under the command of Wuji Heavenly Palace, Taisu Palace has a quota for entry.

Therefore, Ye Tian used the quota of Taisu Palace to come directly to the abyss of Heavenly Inspection.

When Ye Tian arrived, the eyes of those Infinite Heavenly Palace's Supreme Dao Realm were all staring at him, full of killing intent.

But they just stared, but they didn't dare to make a move, and watched Ye Tian enter the abyss of Heavenly Scunding.

After entering the Heavenly Scun Abyss, Ye Tian directly cast the Great Ghost River Secret Technique to find the most strange things.

"I sensed three Dao strange things at once, it seems that there are more Supreme Dao strange things here, it deserves to be the second strange place!" Ye Tian said happily.

The most curious things here are naturally good things for him.

In this way, he would be able to use the Supreme Dao Rule item here to raise the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule to a tenth-percent realm.

"Kill this supreme treasure first!"

Ye Tian shuttled over in an instant.

Soon, the most curious thing died at his hands.

In the following days, Ye Tian frantically slaughtered one by one Supreme Dao Strange Objects in the Heavenly Scun Abyss, but there were also Supreme Dao Strange Objects that could be called invincible in the Sevenfold Realm.

Ye Tian encountered it, even if he was holding the Blood Pattern Tablet, he couldn't beat it, so he could only choose to flee for his life.

However, the most curious thing has no wisdom and will not chase him all the time.

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian gathered a large number of Dao Strange Things, arranged them to the Dao Strange Objects Array again, and began to comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the Dao Dao.

In this way, Ye Tian's seventh sequence of supreme rules improved little by little.

However, when it came to the seventh sequence to the realm of the ninety percent of the Dao rules, it was extremely difficult to ascend one point to the realm, and the closer to the ten-percent realm, the more time it would take.

"Soon, the Ten Percent realm is just around the corner!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The years of the 1,000-digit era have passed.

Now.

Ye Tian's body was filled with a terrifying seventh sequence of supreme rules, as if it filled the entire heaven and earth, and it was perfect.

This is the seventh sequence of the Ten Percent Realm to the Dao Rule Realm!

"Hahahaha, the seventh sequence to the Dao Rule Realm is complete, my current strength is one step closer, and then I will raise my cultivation to the Fourfold Dao Realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

He had already collected countless resources, and the precious resources of several strange places had been scraped away by him.

With so many resources, many of them are treasures that are useful to him and help him break through the realm.

Therefore, it will definitely not be difficult for him to impact the Quadruple Dao Realm.

Soon.

He came out of the abyss of the Heavenly Patrol and returned to the Taisu Palace, the residence of the Taisu Wei Heavenly Monarch.

Subsequently, he began to impact the Quadruple Dao Realm.

Impacting the Quadruple Dao Realm, Taisu Palace has a secret technique called Taisu Realm Breaking Technique, which can slightly increase the success rate.

Ye Tian had already practiced, and now he was going to use this Taisu Realm Breaking Technique plus the top secret medicine of the Taisu Palace, the Taisu Secret Medicine, as well as the various treasures he had collected this time, to impact the Quadruple Dao Realm.

As a result, he has a success rate of about 30%.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian started the first impact, but this time his luck was not good, the breakthrough failed, and the copy body was hit hard.

So, he directly changed to a replica body and continued to impact.

The second time, he was lucky and broke the shackles directly.

In an instant, endless energy poured into his body, and even the Heaven and Earth Origin descended, helping him to step into the Fourfold Dao Realm.

All the time, his cultivation aura was soaring.

Taisu Palace.

The Taisu Palace Lord sensed the breakthrough aura at Ye Tian's location, and when he looked at it, he was immediately shocked.

"What a terrifying breath!"

She felt that Ye Tian's aura was even more powerful than herself, but how could this be?

She is the top sevenfold to the Dao realm, and even if Ye Tian breaks through to the fourfold Dao realm, she will not be his opponent!

The point is that she wanted to spy on the situation, but she was stopped by layers of supreme rules, and she couldn't spy on the slightest.

"Ye Tian's Supreme Dao Rule Realm has already surpassed me!"

The Taisu Palace Lord said secretly.

Only if Ye Tian's Supreme Dao Rule Realm surpassed her, she couldn't spy on Ye Tian.

Thinking of how long it took Ye Tiancai to comprehend, he had such terrifying progress.

"The demon who walks the path of the strongest to the path is too terrifying, I want to cultivate an heir into the path of the strongest to the path of the supreme realm!"

The Taisu Palace Lord thought to himself.

But thinking about it carefully, Ye Tian was able to progress so quickly, and other supreme Dao realms who took the path of the strongest to the Dao couldn't do it.

Just like the demonic Taibai Sword Master, the road to growth is also bumpy, how can it be so easy.

So, she dismissed the idea.

Another period of time had passed, and Ye Tian's cultivation had been completely stabilized, and he had truly reached the Fourfold Dao Realm.

With his current strength, he is not invincible in the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, but it is also the most top-notch existence.

The likes of Taisu Palace Master are no longer his opponents.

In other words, in the Wuji Domain, if the Wuji Heavenly Emperor did not get out of trouble, he could walk sideways.

"Next, I will kill all the supreme dao strange things in the major strange places, the seventh sequence of supreme dao rule items are not for me, but they are useful for my son and the human race, and collecting more is only good and there is no harm. "

So, he also visited the strange places occupied by other forces, and found and killed all the strange things that he could find.

Of course, these strange places will give birth to new Dao strange things in the future, but it will take a long time.

Finally this day.

Except for the first strange place, almost all the most strange things in the other strange places were killed by him.

"First Odd Land!"

Ye Tian's gaze looked through the infinite void and looked at a certain place in the Infinite Domain, which was the location of the First Strange Land, the Forbidden Strange Land.

The forbidden land is very dangerous, there is only one supreme dao strange thing in it, which contains the sixth sequence of supreme dao rules, and its strength is comparable to the eightfold supreme dao realm, while the forbidden strange land only allows the sixfold supreme dao realm to enter at most.

In other words, the Wuji Heavenly Emperor is still there, and he can't enter the forbidden strange land.

For a long time, the Dao Realm that dared to enter the Forbidden Strange Land to find resources had died, so it was included in the Forbidden Strange Land.

The Forbidden Land was returned to the Wuji Heavenly Palace, but the Wuji Heavenly Emperor did not guard the Forbidden Place, and they didn't think that anyone would go to the Forbidden Land to find death.

And this day.

Ye Tian came, he didn't plan to carry the Blood Pattern Tablet, he just wanted to see the Supreme Dao Strange Thing that contained the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao rules.
